examples.title: Explore A Page And Export Artifacts
examples.description: Visits a page, captures a snapshot and screenshot, then exports Playwright and ADF artifacts for follow-up automation work.

examples.title: Multi-Tab Observability Flow
examples.description: Opens multiple tabs, captures tab state, records network activity, and saves a screenshot for the primary tab.

examples.title: Operator Pause Template
examples.description: Launches a visible browser session, pauses for manual work, then captures tabs, console, and network activity after operator continuation.

examples.title: Passkey Flow On WebAuthn.io
examples.description: Registers, authenticates, and deletes a passkey against webauthn.io using the Browser-Actuator virtual authenticator flow.
